explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Eversource Energy's Privacy Policy states that the company does not engage in profiling for solely automated decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects. The 2024 Annual Report (10-K) describes the establishment of an Artificial Intelligence Executive Working Committee and an internal governance and oversight committee with policies and procedures for AI review and approval.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The Eversource Energy Privacy Policy provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. This policy document explicitly states that Eversource does not engage in profiling for solely automated decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects, demonstrating a governance stance on the company's AI capabilities.
relevant_sources.title: Eversource Energy Privacy Policy

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, the "2024 Annual Report (10-K)", provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. The report details the establishment of an "Artificial Intelligence Executive Working Committee" and an internal governance and oversight committee with policies and procedures for AI review and approval, demonstrating a formal approach to managing AI implementation and associated risks.
relevant_sources.title: 2024 Annual Report (10-K)

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Eversource Energy's 2024 Annual Report (10-K) describes the establishment of an Artificial Intelligence Executive Working Committee, which contributes to documented evidence for governance at the policy level. Further, the Eversource Energy Privacy Policy states that the company does not engage in profiling for solely automated decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects, completing the evidence for 1 of 7 evaluated pillars. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars, based on a review of 11 publicly available sources.
